name: horoscope
description: Horoscope vending-machine block — a $dispenser_block subclass driven by a small Workers-AI LLM. The owner sets the persona via system_prompt; requesters :order("scorpio") (or any prompt) and a $dispensed_note arrives in their inventory carrying the generated text.

classes.description: A vending-machine block that produces short generated text artifacts. Owner configures `system_prompt` (the persona / instructions the LLM operates under). The plug Worker (catalogs/horoscope/plug) reads pending_orders, runs @cf/meta/llama-3.2-1b-instruct with `system_prompt + request`, and calls :deliver to drop a note into the requester's inventory. Default rate_limit_seconds=60 (one order per requester per minute).

verbs.name: assert_configurable
verbs.source: verb :assert_configurable() rxd { if (actor == this.owner || has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { return true; } raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "only the block owner or wizard can configure horoscope", value: { actor: actor, block: this } }; }

verbs.name: set_system_prompt
verbs.source: verb :set_system_prompt(prompt) rx { this:assert_configurable(); if (typeof(prompt) != "string" || !str_trim(prompt)) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "set_system_prompt requires a non-empty prompt", value: prompt }; } return this:set_property("system_prompt", str_trim(prompt)); }

verbs.name: set_rate_limits
verbs.source: verb :set_rate_limits(requester_seconds, block_seconds) rx { this:assert_configurable(); let requester = requester_seconds; if (typeof(requester) == "string") { requester = to_int(str_trim(requester)); } let block = block_seconds; if (typeof(block) == "string") { block = to_int(str_trim(block)); } if (typeof(requester) != "number" || requester < 0) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "requester_seconds must be a non-negative number", value: requester_seconds }; } if (typeof(block) != "number" || block < 0) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "block_seconds must be a non-negative number", value: block_seconds }; } return this:set_properties({ rate_limit_seconds: round(requester), block_cooldown_seconds: round(block) }); }

verbs.name: set_queue_limits
verbs.source: verb :set_queue_limits(max_pending_orders, max_request_chars) rx { this:assert_configurable(); let pending = max_pending_orders; if (typeof(pending) == "string") { pending = to_int(str_trim(pending)); } let chars = max_request_chars; if (typeof(chars) == "string") { chars = to_int(str_trim(chars)); } if (typeof(pending) != "number" || pending < 0) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "max_pending_orders must be a non-negative number", value: max_pending_orders }; } if (typeof(chars) != "number" || chars < 0) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "max_request_chars must be a non-negative number", value: max_request_chars }; } return this:set_properties({ max_pending_orders: round(pending), max_request_chars: round(chars) }); }

verbs.name: title
verbs.source: verb :title() rxd { if (this.last_pushed_at == 0) { return this.name + " (disconnected)"; } return this.name; }

verbs.name: default_note_name
verbs.source: verb :default_note_name(entry, body) rxd { let req = ""; if (typeof(entry) == "map" && has(entry, "request") && typeof(entry["request"]) == "string") { req = str_trim(entry["request"]); } if (!req) { return "Horoscope reading"; } let cap = 60; if (length(req) > cap) { req = str_slice(req, 1, cap - 3) + "..."; } return "Horoscope: " + req; }

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { let connected = this.last_pushed_at != 0; let status = "connected"; if (!connected) { status = "disconnected"; } let usage = "Use `order " + this.name + " <sign or topic>` to request a horoscope; it will deliver a note to you when ready."; let pending = length(this.pending_orders); let text = this.description + " Status: " + status + ". " + usage; if (pending > 0) { text = text + " Pending orders: " + to_string(pending) + "."; } return { id: this, title: this:title(), description: text, status: status, connected: connected, last_pushed_at: this.last_pushed_at, last_error: this.last_error, pending_count: pending, usage: usage, location: location(this) }; }
